knowledge.title: Retrieval candidate fusion
knowledge.summary: Fusion ranks lexical, vector, metadata, memory, reference, and graph candidates.
knowledge.content: The retrieval fusion layer combines candidate fusion, reranking, exact file matches, exact symbol matches, exact error matches, labels, and matchReasons. fuseCandidates should preserve direct evidence for source files before adjacent memories.

knowledge.title: Context pack assembly
knowledge.summary: Context pack assembly separates directTaskEvidence, priorLessons, workflowGuidance, and adjacentContext.
knowledge.content: assembleContextPack builds orientation, task brief action items, directTaskEvidence placement, adjacent context, usefulnessReason explanations, and actionable missing signals for agent startup packs.

knowledge.title: Knowledge completeness benchmark workflow
knowledge.summary: Completeness eval reports required fact coverage, source coverage, noise rate, and a knowledge completeness percentage.
knowledge.content: The benchmark should run eval:knowledge-completeness in fixture mode for CI and live mode against POST /context/search when an API base is available. scripts/benchmark.ts should print the knowledge completeness percentage, fixture mode result, live mode result, source coverage, and noise rate.

knowledge.title: Own backup schedulers
knowledge.summary: Storage operations memory for backup scheduler ownership.
knowledge.content: Own backup schedulers in src/operations/backup-service.ts and verify backup retention policies. This storage workflow covers Postgres backup cadence, restore drills, and snapshot rotation.

knowledge.title: Retrieval query classifier
knowledge.summary: classifyQuery extracts files, symbols, errors, technologies, business areas, and domain from the user prompt.
knowledge.content: src/retrieval/classifier.ts owns classifyQuery and labelsFromClassification. classifyQuery infers taskType, files, symbols, errors, technologies, businessAreas, and the inferred domain that drives downstream fusion and context-fit scoring.

knowledge.title: ContextFitEvaluator
knowledge.summary: ContextFitEvaluator scores per-candidate fit, aggregate context fit status, and missing signals.
knowledge.content: src/retrieval/context-fit.ts defines ContextFitEvaluator which scores file, symbol, error, technology, businessArea coverage plus trust, freshness, domain, and safety adjustments. READY_THRESHOLD and NEEDS_CONFIRMATION_THRESHOLD control fitStatus transitions.

knowledge.title: Retrieval policy
knowledge.summary: getRetrievalPolicy returns source weights, hard-signal boosts, freshness windows, and task profiles for fusion.
knowledge.content: src/retrieval/policy.ts holds DEFAULT_POLICY and getRetrievalPolicy. It centralizes sourceWeights, hardSignalBoost, taskItemTypeBoosts, freshness windows per itemType, coverage profiles, and graph hop weights.

knowledge.title: TUB-042 classifier taskType regression
knowledge.summary: TUB-042 was fixed by tightening inferTaskType in src/retrieval/classifier.ts so refactor prompts no longer fall through to implementation.
knowledge.content: When TUB-042 appears, check classifyQuery in src/retrieval/classifier.ts. The recent fix tightened inferTaskType so refactor prompts no longer fall through to implementation. Verify with the retrieval eval fixture before merging.

knowledge.title: Superseded emoji-prompt workaround
knowledge.summary: Older workaround that special-cased emoji prompts in an unrelated parser. Superseded years ago.
knowledge.content: Historical emoji-prompt workaround in a long-removed parser. Predates the current classifier and the 2026 inferTaskType fix. Listed only to keep the audit trail.

knowledge.title: Do not adjust eval thresholds to make tests pass
knowledge.summary: Retrieval eval expectations must remain green; fix the logic, not the fixture.
knowledge.content: Retrieval improvements require eval coverage first. Do not adjust thresholds in eval/retrieval-fixtures.json or context-fit READY_THRESHOLD to make tests pass. Fix the underlying classifier, fusion, or context-fit logic so the fixture passes by signal, not by lowered bars.

knowledge.title: Retrieval eval coverage spec
knowledge.summary: Spec for expanding eval/retrieval-fixtures.json with new task-type scenarios and stale-suppression cases.
knowledge.content: Plan expansions to eval/retrieval-fixtures.json: add task-type-specific cases, stale-suppression assertions, domain mismatch suppression, and exploration-without-hard-signals coverage. Each new case must specify expectedKnowledgeIds, unexpectedKnowledgeIds, expectedContextFitStatus, and minContextFitScore.

knowledge.title: Retrieval pipeline overview tour
knowledge.summary: Retrieval pipeline overview tour describing how the pipeline ranks knowledge for the agent context pack across classify, fuse, rerank, and fit stages.
knowledge.content: Retrieval pipeline overview tour. The pipeline ranks knowledge for the agent context pack by first classifying the prompt, then running lexical, vector, metadata, memory, and graph candidate searches in parallel, then fusing them with weighted reciprocal-rank, then reranking, then scoring context fit, then assembling the context pack. retrieval-pipeline-overview-tour anchors this document.

knowledge.title: Auth login OAuth flow
knowledge.summary: Auth login uses OAuth bearer tokens with rotating refresh tokens.
knowledge.content: The auth login flow uses OAuth bearer tokens. Login returns an access token and a rotating refresh token. Token refresh invalidates the previous refresh token and stores the replacement before returning to the client.

cases.prompt: Implement retrieval fusion/reranking completeness benchmark in src/retrieval/fusion.ts, src/retrieval/context-pack.ts, and scripts/benchmark.ts.

requiredFacts.description: Fusion evidence covers candidate fusion, reranking, and exact source signals.
Context packs include orientation, task brief, direct evidence placement, and usefulness reasons.
Benchmark reporting includes fixture and live completeness percentages.

cases.prompt: Debug TUB-042 failure in src/retrieval/classifier.ts where classifyQuery picks the wrong taskType.

requiredFacts.description: Recent fix narrative for TUB-042 references inferTaskType in classifyQuery.

requiredFacts.description: Implementation evidence covers classifyQuery's domain inference.

cases.prompt: Refactor getRetrievalPolicy in src/retrieval/policy.ts to load source weights from a calibrated table.

requiredFacts.description: Refactor evidence covers sourceWeights and hardSignalBoost ownership in retrieval policy.

requiredFacts.description: Review evidence covers ContextFitEvaluator and the threshold discipline rule.

requiredFacts.description: Planning evidence covers expanding retrieval-fixtures.json across task types.

cases.prompt: explore the retrieval pipeline overview tour and how it ranks knowledge for the agent context pack.
cases.comment: Soft-signal exploration: no files or symbols extractable from the prompt, so the retriever leans on lexical + label coverage. A small amount of adjacent noise is tolerated.

requiredFacts.description: Exploration evidence describes the classify-fuse-rerank-fit pipeline.

cases.prompt: Explain the auth login OAuth refresh token flow.

requiredFacts.description: Auth exploration evidence covers OAuth bearer tokens and rotating refresh tokens.

cases.prompt: Implement retrieval fusion/reranking work in src/retrieval/fusion.ts and src/retrieval/context-pack.ts.

requiredFacts.description: Live retrieval should surface fusion/reranking source evidence.
Live retrieval should surface context pack assembly evidence.
